description: Washington-based hawkish national security think tank founded after 9/11. Known for its Iran sanctions and maximum-pressure advocacy. Hosts the Center on Economic and Financial Power and a dedicated Iran Program. Senior director [Behnam Ben Taleblu](/people/behnam-ben-taleblu) is a frequent congressional witness on Iranian missiles, sanctions, and proxy networks.
editorial_notes: FDD is generally considered hawkish/neoconservative on Iran and strongly supportive of Israel. Critics note significant overlap with pro-Israel donor networks.
